metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7.10 project 全局进度层 · 引入 .superteam/project.md 解决 phase finish 被误当 project end 的根本 bug (SMS phase-4-s3-module 走完 finish 后被误标 mode.lifecycle=ended, 但实际还有 V1.5+→V2.0.0 多个里程碑待做)。架构: 1 project 含 N milestone, 每个 milestone = 1 phase = 1 SuperTeam 工作流闭环。新增: hooks/lib/project_state.py (frontmatter + 表格解析) · stop.py 双层判定 (project.md 在则用 is_project_active 否则 fallback V4.7.9 mode_state.is_project_alive) · stop_finish_guard 自动标 milestone DONE · SessionStart 注入 project banner · mode_cli 新增 project-init / project-status / project-next / project-complete / reopen 子命令 · 5 个对应 skill。无 project.md 老项目完全向后兼容走 V4.7.9 行为。继承 V4.7.9 ≥4 阈值 valve / 5 要素强引导 reason / fail-closed try except / V4.7.6 兼容层 / V4.7.5 状态机文件 BLOCK 列表。95/95 测试全绿 (45 V4.6 e2e + 15 V4.7.5 baseline + 7 V4.7.6 兼容 + 8 V4.7.7 lifecycle + 2 V4.7.7 AST 纯净 + 18 V4.7.10 project layer)。
